headline: Q1 Earnings Outperformers: A. O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) And The Rest Of The HVAC and Water Systems Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the hvac and water systems industry, including A. O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) and its peers.
